scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n worker,native -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:native"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:worker && native build . --yes
scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:worker && native check . --strict
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:worker
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:worker && node scripts/prepare-macos-runtime.mjs && native package --target macos --manifest app.zon --assets frontend/dist --signing adhoc
